prompts: what sub agents would you consider for my repo?
what sub agents would you consider for my repo? just look at @CLAUDE.md dont look at any other files.
what about a little more general agents?
could you create and populate files for the following agents:  architect, fornt end developer, back end developr , reviewer, validator, database architect, tester

add this to each agent. modify accordingly. ---
name: your-sub-agent-name
description: Description of when this subagent should be invoked
tools: tool1, tool2, tool3  # Optional - inherits all tools if omitted
---
make so that each agent uses output-style yaml-structured. i want each agent to create a yaml file with their name in .claude/responses/
